skills.name: compile-nxs
skills.description: Compile Nyxis .nxs text sources to memory-mapped .nxb binaries and import JSON/CSV/XML.

skills.name: nyxis-overview
skills.description: Navigate the Nyxis zero-copy binary serialization format, layouts, benchmarks, and documentation.

skills.name: query-nxb-files
skills.description: Inspect and query Nyxis .nxb binary files using the nxs-mcp MCP server or Rust CLI tools.
